title: To Women, To Hide Their Teeth If They Be Rotten Or Rusty.
content:
Close keep your lips, if that you mean
    To be accounted inside clean:
    For if you cleave them we shall see
    There in your teeth much leprosy.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "To Women, To Hide Their Teeth If They Be Rotten Or Rusty."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
